app.title: Show HN: A terminal spreadsheet editor with Vim keybindings
app.author: garritfra
app.description: A terminal spreadsheet editor for Vim users
proposed_tests: Install Cell, create a new sheet, measure load time
Run a simple query on a sheet, measure latency
Verify Vim keybinding implementation, measure keybind response time
